18.reason: [The character literal 'fm[i-1]' is invalid; it should be the variable fm[i-1] without quotes. Using single quotes around fm[i-1] treats it as a multi-character constant, which is not valid C and causes undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The character literal 'fm[i-1]' is invalid; it should be the variable fm[i-1] without quotes. Using single quotes around fm[i-1] treats it as a multi-character constant, which is not valid C and causes undefined behavior.]
